def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by code, date for per-code time-series operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])
    
    # ts_rank(volume, 5): 5-day time-series rank of volume
    vol_rank = ts_rank(pl.col('volume'), window=5)
    
    # ts_rank(high, 5): 5-day time-series rank of high
    high_rank = ts_rank(pl.col('high'), window=5)
    
    # correlation(ts_rank(volume, 5), ts_rank(high, 5), 5): 5-day rolling correlation
    corr = correlation(vol_rank, high_rank, window=5)
    
    # ts_max(correlation, 3): 3-day rolling max
    max_corr = rolling_max(corr, window=3)
    
    # -1 * ts_max(...)
    factor = -1 * max_corr
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
